name: HWR_POST_CON_STATUS
description: Table to save the skill scoring check points.

columns.Name: ID
columns.Comments: This is the primary key for this table.

columns.Name: STATUS
columns.Comments: The status of last skill scoring, completed or in progress.

columns.Name: LOAD_TYPE
columns.Comments: Indicates if it is incremental or topic ID.

columns.Name: LAST_RUN_TIME
columns.Comments: The last time skill scoring has ran.

columns.Name: LAST_STATEMENT_TIME
columns.Comments: The time stamp of the last loaded statement.

columns.Name: LAST_TOPIC_ID
columns.Comments: The ID of the last loaded skill topic.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
